name: Anthropic Daily Costs
description: Retrieves Anthropic API spending on a daily basis for a configurable number of days.

input_schema.name: ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_API_KEY
input_schema.label: Anthropic Admin API key env var name
input_schema.description:
Anthropic Admin API key is required to access cost report endpoints. 

You'll need to create an Organization and Team (free) to create an Admin API key.
      
Create one at https://console.anthropic.com/account/api-keys

input_schema.name: days
input_schema.label: Number of days
input_schema.description: How many past days to retrieve costs for (max 31)
